scope.slice: M4-B.1 (IHostCapabilitiesService contract + implementation + composition root + unit tests)
scope.branch: feature/T-024-m4-b-1-host-capabilities-contract-and-service (created from main at the M4-B plan promotion commit 131b8bd; the M4-B.1 closeout commit feat(m4-b.1): add IHostCapabilitiesService contract and SystemHostCapabilitiesService implementation is on this branch; the branch is fast-forwarded into main per the branching strategy rule 6; the branch is deleted per rule 7)
in_scope: Land the IHostCapabilitiesService contract in src/AiEng.Platform.Application/Capabilities/IHostCapabilitiesService.cs (single async method Task<HostCapabilities> DetectAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)).

Land the HostCapabilities + HostCapability sealed record classes in src/AiEng.Platform.Application/Capabilities/HostCapabilities.cs (HostCapabilities: IReadOnlyList<HostCapability> Capabilities + DateTimeOffset DetectedAt; HostCapability: string Key + bool Available + string? Version + bool CredentialAvailable + string? CredentialName).
Land the internal HostToolProbe + ProviderCredentialProbe record types in src/AiEng.Platform.Infrastructure/Capabilities/CapabilityProbe.cs (probe definitions; not exposed to the App layer).

Land the SystemHostCapabilitiesService implementation in src/AiEng.Platform.Infrastructure/Capabilities/SystemHostCapabilitiesService.cs (sealed class; ctor injects IProcessRunner + ICredentialVault + IPlatformInfo + ILogger<SystemHostCapabilitiesService> + optional TimeProvider; 6 host tool probes for git + ollama + powershell.exe + wsl.exe + wt.exe + bash.exe via IProcessRunner.RunToCompletionAsync(tool, new[] { arguments }, linkedCts.Token); 6 provider credential probes via ICredentialVault.GetAsync(provider:tool:token, ct); 5-second per-tool linked CancellationTokenSource timeout; IPlatformInfo.IsWindows gating for Windows-only tools; per-tool Regex version parsing; outer-cancellation propagation via re-throw; exception swallowing with LogWarning for Win32Exception + InvalidOperationException + IOException).

Land the AddHostCapabilities composition root extension in src/AiEng.Platform.App/Composition/Capabilities/CapabilitiesServiceCollectionExtensions.cs (TryAddSingleton<IHostCapabilitiesService, SystemHostCapabilitiesService>; mirrors AddInfrastructure pattern).
Wire AddHostCapabilities into AddPlatformServices in src/AiEng.Platform.App/Composition/ServiceCollectionExtensions.cs (one using + one call).

Land 20 unit tests + 3 in-line test doubles (FakeProcessRunner, FakeCredentialVault, FakePlatformInfo) in tests/AiEng.Platform.UnitTests/Capabilities/SystemHostCapabilitiesServiceTests.cs (constructor argument validation x4; happy path; non-zero exit; exception; timeout; non-Windows host; credential available; credential absent; version parsing; version pattern miss; DetectedAt TimeProvider; DetectedAt call window; deterministic order; cancellation before; cancellation during; timeout swallowed).

Update the project-continuity state per Rule 15: session.json (this file), tasks.json (T-024 record added with full evidence block; T-025 M4-B.2 record added in Ready), current.md (active slice M4-B to M4-B.1; last completed task T-024; next recommended task T-025), task-board.md (M4-B.1 in Done Recently), milestones.json (M4-B.1 slice block added; M4-B.1 evidence block initialised), capabilities.json (C-015 evidence.source_paths + evidence.tests populated; C-015 next_task set to T-025; C-015 last_updated 2026-07-13).
Write the M4-B.1 per-session handoff at .ai/handoffs/2026-07-13-m4-b-1-host-capabilities-contract-and-service.md (mirrored to .ai/handoffs/latest.md). Use unix2dos to convert to CRLF.
Write the M4-B.1 implementation report at implementation-report-m4-b-1-host-capabilities-contract-and-service.md (15 sections mirroring the M4-A.1 + M4-A.2 reports). Use unix2dos to convert to CRLF.

Design-system AppDialog primitive. M4-B.1 does not introduce a new design-system primitive. The /diagnostics page composes the M1.2 primitives (AppPanel, AppCard, AppStack, AppBadge, AppStatusDot) and the M3.2 AppPageHeader; the two new components (AppCapabilityList + AppKeyValueList) are data-owning four-state per docs/design-system.md section 5.4.

macOS / Linux credential vault. The WindowsCredentialVault is Windows-only; on non-Windows hosts the M4-B.1 SystemHostCapabilitiesService gates Windows-only tools (powershell.exe, wsl.exe, wt.exe) on IPlatformInfo.IsWindows.

Push to remote. Push is not authorised in this session; the remote (origin = https://github.com/maestroohk/ai-engineering-platform.git) is configured but pushing is not authorised. The M4-B.1 first session does not push.
